---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Synaptipy
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Python version**: [e.g., 3.11.9]
- **Synaptipy version**: [e.g., 0.1.0b6 - check with `python -c "import Synaptipy; print(Synaptipy.__version__)"`]
- **Installation method**: [conda environment / pip / standalone installer]

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open Synaptipy
2. Load file '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear description of what actually happened.

## Error Traceback

```
Paste the full traceback here (if applicable).
```

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

- File format being analyzed (e.g., `.abf`, `.nwb`, `.wcp`)
- Any custom plugins loaded
- Any other relevant details
